message:
🐛 Add continue-on-error to vllm-d secrets step

The ARC runner SA (arc-systems:default) lacks RBAC to create/update
secrets in the kc namespace. Since secrets already exist from previous
deploys, allow the step to fail gracefully and proceed with Helm deploy.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -121,6 +121,7 @@ jobs:
             --from-literal=github-token=${{ secrets.KSC_GITHUB_TOKEN }} \
             --from-literal=google-drive-api-key=${{ secrets.KSC_GOOGLE_DRIVE_API_KEY }} \
             --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
+        continue-on-error: true
 
       - name: Deploy with Helm
         run: |
